_comment: Performance budgets for gym-web. These are ratchets: each value is set at (or near) the current baseline so the suite is green today and any regression fails. As performance fixes land, tighten the numbers. See perf/README.md.

static._comment: Static source budgets, checked by tests/perf/client-component-budget.test.ts (no browser needed).

render._comment: Re-render budgets, checked by tests/perf/render-count.test.tsx. count = profiled update commits when an unrelated parent state change occurs. These leaves are memoized (React.memo) with stable props, so each must record 0; any regression that breaks memoization fails the suite.

bundleKBGzip._comment: Per-route first-load client JS budget in KB (gzipped), checked by scripts/check-bundle-budgets.mjs after `next build`. Ratchets pinned just above the measured baseline after the perf work (recharts and heavy panels are dynamic-imported; read-mostly pages are server components). Heaviest route /workouts/[id] = 210 KB. Tighten further as fixes land.

webVitals._comment: Runtime budgets, checked by e2e/perf/web-vitals.perf.spec.ts against a running app. Thresholds follow Google 'good' targets with headroom for a local run.
